page: Microsoft Azure D64ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The CPU operates at a clock speed of 3.525 GHz and is supported by 256 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Storage is bundled as a 2458 GB local disk, and the instance supports Premium Storage. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-threaded and memory performance. The instance achieves top-tier status in PassMark memory testing and registers strong results in multi-core CPU performance, software compilation, and database operations. Redis SET operations reach 63.62 million operations per second. While cached memory bandwidth is highly efficient, uncached large-block read and write speeds fall into the average tier. Single-core performance and static web serving throughput also align with average baseline expectations.

Given its high resource density, the D64ads_v5 offers a balanced cost-to-performance profile for enterprise workloads requiring substantial local storage and memory capacity without the premium of specialized memory-optimized hardware. The combination of 64 vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and a 2.4 TB local disk makes this server well-suited for relational databases, Redis caching layers, multi-threaded data processing, software compilation pipelines, and medium-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D64ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine configured with an AMD EPYC 7763 processor operating at 3.525 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, it delivers 64 dedicated vCPUs across 32 physical cores, paired with 256 GB of RAM and a bundled 2458 GB local storage disk. Benchmark evaluations highlight top-tier memory performance and strong multi-core processing capabilities, particularly in software compilation, database operations, and Redis caching. However, uncached memory bandwidth and single-core execution speeds remain average. This resource profile provides a balanced, cost-efficient architecture for demanding enterprise workloads. It is highly suited for database hosting, caching layers, software build pipelines, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64ads_v5 is a general-purpose VM featuring 64 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage. Powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 CPU, it delivers top-tier memory performance and strong database capabilities.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D64ads_v5 is a general-purpose VM with 64 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 2458 GB local storage, optimized for databases and multi-threaded tasks.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose instance featuring sixty-four dedicated AMD cores, high-capacity local storage, and top-tier memory performance for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 64 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores
256 GB system memory with top-tier PassMark memory performance
Bundled 2458 GB local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong multi-core execution, software compilation, and database benchmarks
Suited for relational databases, Redis caching, and multi-threaded data processing
